name: AI Lead Generation Automation
description: An AI-powered lead generation workflow built with n8n and Google Gemini that automates the entire process of collecting and enriching business leads. The system captures lead details via a form, processes the data through an AI agent, retrieves additional business information through external APIs, and stores enriched results in Google Sheets — all fully automated.
keyFeatures: Automated lead collection through form input
AI agent for lead data processing and enrichment
API integration for retrieving business information
Automated storage of leads in Google Sheets

name: Gemini Chatbot Workflow
description: A conversational AI chatbot powered by Google Gemini, orchestrated within n8n. When a user sends a message, the workflow routes it through a Basic LLM Chain to generate intelligent responses. The output is then sent to an external text-to-speech API and the final audio or text response is returned to the user via webhook.
keyFeatures: Chat trigger for real-time user interaction
result: Real-time AI chat with voice output

name: Calendar Event Agent
description: An AI-powered calendar assistant that interprets natural language queries to retrieve events and check schedule availability from Google Calendar. Users can ask questions like "What events are scheduled on October 20?" and the agent intelligently selects the right calendar tool, fetches results, and returns event details — with context memory for follow-up queries.
keyFeatures: AI agent with tool selection logic
Returns event descriptions, dates, and links

name: Gmail AI Agent
description: An AI-powered Gmail assistant that sends emails automatically based on natural language instructions. Users simply type a command like "Send email to example@gmail.com with subject Login Successful" — the AI agent extracts the recipient, subject, and body, structures the email content via an LLM, and dispatches it through the Gmail API.
keyFeatures: AI-driven extraction of recipient, subject, and body
Automatic email dispatch via Gmail API

name: Deepgram Text-to-Speech
description: A workflow that converts AI-generated text into natural-sounding speech using the Deepgram Text-to-Speech API. A user message is first processed by a Large Language Model to generate a contextual response, which is then converted into high-quality audio and returned to the user seamlessly.

name: Intermost
description: A modern SaaS platform for internal team communication and project management with real-time collaboration features.

name: Access Mails
description: AI-driven email marketing platform with intelligent segmentation, A/B testing, and automated campaign optimization.

name: RyRaah
description: Intelligent voice assistant application powered by advanced NLP for customer service automation.

name: Ombase
description: Enterprise cloud management dashboard with real-time monitoring, cost optimization, and infrastructure analytics.

name: Nikam Interior
description: Modern portfolio and booking platform for an interior design studio with 3D room previews and appointment scheduling.

name: Gemini Weather Assistant
description: An AI-powered weather assistant that answers natural language queries like "What's the weather in Mumbai?" using Google Gemini and the Open-Meteo API. Built with FastAPI on the backend and Streamlit on the frontend, it delivers real-time, conversational weather updates through a clean, chat-style interface.
keyFeatures: Natural language weather queries via Gemini AI
Real-time weather data from Open-Meteo API
FastAPI backend for efficient request handling

name: Ollama MCP AI Chatbot
description: An AI chatbot powered by a local Ollama LLaMA model with MCP (Model Context Protocol) for real-time tool access. The chatbot fetches live information — weather, YouTube links, and news — by calling external APIs. A Streamlit chat interface lets users converse with the AI while the FastAPI backend orchestrates tool calls seamlessly.
keyFeatures: MCP tool calling for real-time data
Tools for weather, YouTube search, and news
result: AI assistant with live tool-calling capabilities

name: RAG-PDF Chatbot
description: An intelligent AI assistant that lets users upload multiple PDFs and instantly retrieve accurate, context-aware answers directly from the content. Built with Streamlit, LangChain, FAISS vector search, and Google Gemini AI, it combines retrieval-augmented generation with state-of-the-art generative AI for precise, document-grounded responses — complete with conversation history tracking.
keyFeatures: RAG-based AI retrieval with FAISS vector search
Google Gemini integration for contextually accurate answers
Conversation history tracking with CSV export
Works with personal and professional documents
result: Instant context-aware answers from any PDF

name: YOLOv11 Computer Vision Projects
description: A set of computer vision projects powered by YOLOv11 and Mediapipe. Includes a real-time car counting system that tracks both incoming and outgoing traffic on roads, and a hand-gesture-controlled interface using Mediapipe for intuitive cursor control — all processing live video streams with optimized model performance.
keyFeatures: Real-time car detection and counting with YOLOv11
result: Real-time object detection and gesture control

name: AI-Powered Part Identification System
description: An AI-powered visual part identification system that bridges the gap between 3D CAD models and real-world components. The system processes and indexes engineering part data, allowing users to identify machine parts using visual input — automating part discovery and improving operational efficiency in equipment maintenance workflows.
keyFeatures: Visual part identification from real-world images
Engineering part data indexing and retrieval
RAG pipeline for intelligent part lookup
result: Automated part discovery for maintenance workflows

name: Agentic AI Business Insights Platform
description: An agentic AI analytics platform that processes dealership operational data (Excel and structured datasets) and generates deep analytical insights using LLM-based reasoning. The application automatically detects weak business areas and provides decision-ready summaries through a conversational AI interface.
keyFeatures: Automatic detection of weak business areas
SQL + vector routing for hybrid data access
result: Automated business intelligence from raw data

name: AI Computer-Use Training Agent
description: An AI-powered computer-use agent that assists in training employees by automatically navigating enterprise software interfaces. The agent demonstrates step-by-step actions while providing voice-based guidance, enabling hands-free learning and significantly reducing onboarding time.
keyFeatures: Automated navigation of enterprise software interfaces

name: AI Video Generation Platform
description: A video generation platform that enables users to generate AI videos using advanced generative models through an easy-to-use interface. The system manages multiple requests, handles API orchestration, and provides scalable video generation workflows.
keyFeatures: AI video generation via generative models

name: Hands-Free AI Form Filling System
description: A production-grade AI automation tool that fills complex forms using natural language instructions. The system uses an AI agent capable of understanding the interface and performing actions autonomously — turning plain-text commands into completed form submissions.
keyFeatures: Browser automation with AI agent control
result: Zero-effort form automation via natural language
